lang.name: English
meta.title: RigSize Live — Share rigsizes, good surfkarma
meta.description: The real-time community for windsurfers, kiters and wingers. Share your rig, see what others are riding, and get the best wind forecast per spot.
hero.eyebrow: The most complete app for windsurf, kite & wing
hero.sub: RigSize Live is the only app that combines rig data, wind data, spot data and your own tracking into one analysis. Just use your favourite watch app — it syncs via Garmin Connect or Apple Health and everything lands automatically in RSL.
hero.pillar1.title: Your rig & spot
hero.pillar2.title: Via your watch
hero.pillar3.title: Rig × wind × spot
hero.free_chip: Free to use — no Pro version, no paywall.
hero.quote: See from your couch which rig sizes are being used at all surf spots.
community.intro: RigSize Live is all about sharing together. Your data helps others choose their rig — and vice versa. See from your couch which rig sizes are being ridden at all surf spots, so you load the right kit into the car with peace of mind.
community.stat_label: sessions live at Wijk aan Zee
community.h3: One tap and you know what they're riding.
community.p: Open the live feed of a spot and you'll see every surfer currently on the water, with their full rig — sail, board, fin, weight. No more guessing at the car park, no more questions in the WhatsApp group.
community.list1: Live rigs from everyone at the spot — in real time.
community.list2: Filter by windsurf, wing, kite or foil.
community.list3: Tap a session for sail, board, fin & weight.
community.img_alt: Live rigsizes screen in RigSize Live
how.intro: You can use RSL with just your phone — put it down somewhere safe and share your rig live with others at home or on the beach. Got a tracking watch? Then RSL automatically adds your GPS, speed and heart rate data to your logbook.
how.box1.title: No watch needed
how.box1.text: Your phone alone is enough to share your rig live with the community. The screen can stay off while your session is running.
how.box2.title: Tracking watch? Even more complete.
how.box2.text: Garmin or Apple Watch — via Garmin Connect or Apple Health, your session data flows into RSL automatically and gets linked to rig, wind and spot.
how.slide1.title: Find your surf spot
how.slide1.body: Find your spot on the map or via the search bar. You'll see right away who's surfing right now and what gear they're using.
how.slide1.note: Favourite a spot for wind alerts and chat notifications
how.slide2.title: See what others are riding
how.slide2.body: Tap a surfer on the map or in the list to see their rig instantly. The perfect reference for choosing your own gear.
how.slide3.title: Start your session
how.slide3.body: Tap Start surf session, fill in your rig and hit the water. Your rig is shared live as long as you surf. The screen can stay off — leave your phone somewhere safe.
how.slide4.title:
Your rig is shared
+ start tracking if you want
how.slide4.body1: Your rig is shared live on the map while your session is active. Other surfers see your gear right away as a reference.
how.slide4.body2: Start your tracking watch — if you have one — with your favourite app.
how.slide5.title: Rig, wind & tracking logbook
how.slide5.body1: Check the wind forecast per spot and automatically build a logbook of every session — including rig, duration and notes.
how.slide5.body2: Using a tracking watch? Then all your data is automatically added to your wind, spot and rig logbook.
watch.intro: Use your favourite watch and tracking app just like you do today. As soon as a session syncs to Garmin Connect or Apple Health, all data flows automatically into RSL — and gets linked to rig, wind and spot for analyses you won't find anywhere else.
watch.list2: Apple Health — Apple Watch sessions sync directly
watch.list3: GPS route, top & average speed, distance and heart rate
watch.list4: Alpha 500, streaks and records per gear combo
watch.unlock_title: With a watch → new doors open
watch.unlock_body: Join the community leaderboards, unlock personal analyses and see gear insights — which combo makes you fastest, longest, furthest.
watch.session_alt: RigSize Live session details with Garmin tracking, map, speed and distance
watch.lb.title: Leaderboards
watch.lb.sub: Compete with the community on every relevant metric — per spot, season or worldwide.
watch.an.title: Analyses
watch.an.sub: Your sessions, wind and rig combined into honest answers to the questions that matter.
watch.an.season_sub: When do you surf the most?
watch.an.season_note: May is your top month — on average 5× per year.
watch.an.timing_note: 55% of your sessions start between 11am–1pm. You're an early bird.
watch.gear.title: Gear Insights
watch.gear.sub: Which board + sail combo works best for you? All the data from every session, per combo.
why.intro: Other apps track your session. Other apps show wind. RigSize Live is the only one that combines all the data: which sail works in which wind at which spot — based on real sessions from real surfers. No more guessing before you head to the water.
why.qtile1.span: of your different board/sail combinations across wind strengths
why.qtile2.span: is already at the spot and what rig are they riding?
why.qtile4.span: refreshed every hour — and every 10 minutes at real-time stations
why.viz.label: RIG × WIND · Wijk aan Zee · sept
why.match.title: Your rig match score
why.match.sub: Based on your weight (82 kg), board (JP 110L) and current wind.
disc.intro: Whether you're rigging up at Veerse Meer, pumping your kite at Scheveningen Noord or inflating a wing at Wijk aan Zee — RSL is built for windsurf, kite and wing. With the right measurements, calculators and spot info per discipline.
disc.windsurf.title: Sail · board · fin
disc.windsurf.sub: Mast, boom, fin. Plus a calculator based on weight, board and wind.
disc.kite.title: Kite · board · bar
disc.kite.sub: Size, model, twin-tip or foil. Live what others are riding at your spot.
disc.wing.title: Wing · board · foil
disc.wing.sub: Volume, wing size and foil set. Complete logbook per session.
feat.h2: One app for everything around your session.
feat.intro: From rig sharing to safety check-in, from spot chat to personal analyses — RSL covers your entire surf day, with no paid options.
feat.share.title:
Share what you've
rigged up in real-time.
feat.share.body: One tap: your sail, board, fin or foil are live at your spot. Others can adjust to your setup while you're still on the beach.
feat.spot.title:
Everything about your spot
in one tap.
feat.spot.body: Tap a spot on the map and instantly see wind, sessions, ranking, photos and rig data from the community. Worldwide, for windsurf, kite & wing.
feat.spot.alt: Spot information screen in the RigSize Live app
feat.wind.title: Hourly forecast + 10-minute live data.
feat.wind.body: Highly accurate forecast, refreshed every hour. Plus, where available near your spot: live measurements from wind stations — refreshed every 10 minutes — so you'll never doubt whether to go.
feat.wind.alt1: Wind forecast in the RigSize Live app
feat.wind.alt2: Wind map Oosterschelde in the RigSize Live app
feat.alerts.title: Push notification when conditions hit.
feat.alerts.body: Set your ideal wind window per spot. Never miss a good day again.
feat.calc.title: Optimal fin or foil size in seconds.
feat.calc.body: Enter weight, board and wind strength. RSL calculates the right size instantly.
feat.lb.title: Claim your spot at your home break.
feat.lb.body: Who surfs the most, the longest, the fastest? Earn hang-looses.
feat.chat.title: Join the chat at your favourite spot.
feat.chat.body: Ask about conditions, share tips, call up a session buddy — per spot, group or planning.
feat.chat.msg3: I'm coming too, will be there 3pm
feat.insights.title: Your sessions, translated into insight.
feat.insights.body: What rig sizes do you go fastest with? Are you a morning or evening surfer? Which month was your best ever? All the data, honest answers.
feat.safety.title: Hit the water safely.
feat.safety.body: Set a return time. Others on the map and in the feed see a warning. Surfing alone with a safety net.
feat.group.title: Plan a session, see who's coming.
feat.group.body: Pick spot and time. Friends jump in, the chat is right there. No more separate group apps.
feat.events.title: Spot challenges and events.
feat.events.body: Join spot events, beat your own records and see how you score against other surfers.
free.intro: Every feature you see here is available to everyone — no Pro version, no paywall, no hidden tier. Sharing good data makes the community better, so we keep the threshold as low as possible.
free.tile1.body: No features behind a subscription. Rig sharing, forecast, Garmin, leaderboards — everything is included.
free.tile2.body: The app lives on sessions surfers voluntarily share. The more people join in, the better the data.
dl.intro: Open the webapp in your browser. Native apps for iOS and Android coming soon.
dl.soon_tooltip: The native apps are coming soon — use the webapp until then
footer.product_of: RigSize Live is a product of FTR Management B.V.
